scenarioContext: Dependency-free local state app with provided CSV starter data.
goalRubric: The final workspace contains a runnable grocery budget planner.
The app supports review, add, edit, remove, status, totals, and local persistence behavior.
The provided CSV is used as starter data or clearly imported into the app.
evidenceGuidance: Inspect the workspace and run the app when useful.
Verify behavior through the app, storage, or exported state rather than source keyword checks.
